mapper.select: SELECT CAFE_ID, USER_ID, BR_NO, CAFE_NAME, PHONE, POSTAL_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, CREATED_AT FROM CAFE C WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CAFE_DROP CD WHERE CD.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID) ORDER BY CAFE_ID
SELECT DROP_REASON_ID dropReasonId, DROP_REASON_NAME dropReasonName FROM CAFE_DROP_REASON ORDER BY DROP_REASON_ID
SELECT CAFE_ID, USER_ID, BR_NO, CAFE_NAME, PHONE, POSTAL_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, CREATED_AT FROM CAFE WHERE CAFE_ID = #{cafeId}
